privileged_info_summary: The task uses Microsoft Word 2010 in the microsoft_word_starter_env@0.1 environment (Windows 11 with Office 2010 Pro Plus). The task requires creating a new document titled 'Office Emergency Response Procedures' with a three-level hierarchical list containing 3 main sections (Fire Emergency, Medical Emergency, Severe Weather), 8 subsections, and 17 procedural items across all subsections. The document must be saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Emergency_Response_Procedures.docx. All metadata claims regarding content structure, file path, title, and data provenance have been verified against the task.json description. The task uses synthetic test data (procedural emergency response content) and does not use external datasets or pre-existing data files.
